bio: Electrical Engineering professional with a focus on process optimization and automation in manufacturing. I build systems that enhance production efficiency, reduce defects, and provide actionable insights for continuous improvement.
name: ABDULLAH SYED
title: Process Engineering Professional

projects.title: Non Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM) Smart Energy Meter
projects.description: Developed a smart energy meter using ESP32 for real-time monitoring of multiple household appliances.

education.description: Focused on Microelectronic Circuits, Digital Signal Processing, Control Systems, and Robotics.

highlights: Automated SMT fallout tracking with Python, enabling shift-level trend analysis and executive reporting.
Built production yield and defect tracking system, generating weekly revenue-impact reports.
Developed factory-wide maintenance management system using Microsoft Forms, tracking requests and downtime.
experience.description: Supported SMT and hand assembly operations, focusing on defect reduction and line performance optimization.

highlights: Led project to design and manufacture a Flex PCB testing device, saving the company over $40,000.
Designed and 3D printed a scaled project enclosure using Fusion 360.
Implemented C communication protocols to interface devices for seamless data transfer.
experience.description: Led a project to design and manufacture a device for quality testing Flex PCBs, projected to save over $40,000.

sloganHeroSection: Automating manufacturing processes to cut defects and boost throughput.
